CSE_vs_ECE.verdict: CSE if coding and software career. ECE if VLSI, hardware, or telecom interest.
CSE_vs_ECE.key_insight: ECE at top IITs lets you switch to software easily; CSE switching to core hardware is harder.

CSE_vs_MnC.verdict: MnC if you love math and want research/quant finance. CSE if you want more industry roles.
CSE_vs_MnC.key_insight: MnC cutoffs are often similar to CSE but the branch is smaller and more selective in feel.

CSE_vs_EE.verdict: CSE for software/startup path. EE for hardware/research/PSU.
CSE_vs_EE.key_insight: EE at old IITs offers excellent research depth and VLSI opportunities.

Mechanical_vs_Civil.verdict: Mechanical for broader industry + startup options. Civil if government/infrastructure is the goal.
Mechanical_vs_Civil.key_insight: Civil Engineering is the strongest path for IES (Indian Engineering Services).

NIT_CSE_vs_IIT_lower_branch.scenario: NIT Trichy CSE vs IIT (new) Mechanical
NIT_CSE_vs_IIT_lower_branch.verdict: Almost always take NIT Trichy CSE over IIT in an uninteresting branch.
NIT_CSE_vs_IIT_lower_branch.key_insight: Branch > Institute for career outcomes in most cases, except for research and top MBA.

IIIT_H_CSE_vs_IIT_new_CSE.scenario: IIIT Hyderabad CSE vs New IIT CSE
IIIT_H_CSE_vs_IIT_new_CSE.verdict: IIIT-H CSE is better for software/AI careers. New IIT CSE better only for IIT brand value.
IIIT_H_CSE_vs_IIT_new_CSE.key_insight: IIIT-H median package often exceeds new IITs for CS roles.

dimension_explanations.salary_winner: Branch with higher median placement package
dimension_explanations.placement_ease_winner: Branch where getting placed is easier (more companies, higher offer rate)
dimension_explanations.core_jobs_winner: Branch directly relevant to core engineering industry jobs
dimension_explanations.startup_winner: Branch with higher startup success probability
dimension_explanations.flexibility_winner: Branch that keeps most career paths open
dimension_explanations.mba_winner: Branch with higher IIM admit rate or stronger MBA candidacy
dimension_explanations.abroad_winner: Branch with stronger MS/PhD admission prospects abroad
dimension_explanations.govt_winner: Branch most relevant for government/PSU/IES/UPSC paths
